<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\Search; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/ft.sugadd/ * * Add a suggestion string to an auto-complete suggestion dictionary. */ class FTSUGADD extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'FT.SUGADD'; } public function setArguments(array $arguments) { [$key, $string, $score] = $arguments; $commandArguments = (!empty($arguments[3])) ? $arguments[3]->toArray() : []; parent::setArguments(array_merge( [$key, $string, $score], $commandArguments )); } }
